question.text: Exchange-traded currency derivatives in India are jointly regulated by:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** ETCD has dual regulation: RBI (primary role in forex regulation covering all activities) and SEBI (limited to exchange-traded derivatives). Exchanges and CCs operate within both regulatory frameworks. **The Trap:** RBI's role is broader (all forex activities) while SEBI focuses on exchange-traded segment only. **Cross-Exam Context:** Regulatory jurisdiction is fundamental to Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The RBI-SEBI Standing Technical Committee coordinates between the two regulators on ETCD matters.
